title: Set 8: The Robot Competition 🤖
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: for young inventors last month. My friend Bobby and I decided to build a robot that could help carry heavy books. We made the body of the robot out of light

so it could move easily.

Bobby is very
the robot to follow us when we called its name. It wasn't easy; in fact, it was quite
to get the legs to move at the same time. We spent many hours looking at the computer

to fix the problems.

On the day of the contest, our robot ran quickly across the room and picked up a large box of books. The judges were very impressed! We won first prize, and I still can't believe that we built something so amazing ourselves.

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: A new computer for the classroom
Learning to fix a broken car

explanations_vi: Làm thân robot bằng kim loại (metal) nhẹ để dễ di chuyển.
Bobby rất thông minh/giỏi (clever) về máy tính.
Cậu ấy đã lập trình (programmed) cho robot đi theo khi gọi tên.
Rất khó khăn (difficult) để làm cho các chân di chuyển cùng lúc.
Dành nhiều giờ nhìn vào màn hình (screen) máy tính để sửa lỗi.
Tiêu đề B (Phát minh chiến thắng của chúng tôi) là đúng nhất vì câu chuyện nói về việc tạo ra robot và giành giải nhất.
